---
title: "Convert Rmds file to R files"
author: "Fred Cudhea & Brooke Bell"
date: "`r format(Sys.time(), '%d %B, %Y')`"
output: html_document
editor_options: 
  chunk_output_type: console
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}

knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE,
                      results = "hide", 
                      message = FALSE,
                      warning = TRUE)

```

The final step is to convert all of the Rmd files to R files so that you can run on the cluster.

```{r convert, include=TRUE}

library(knitr)

# start with 02 since 01 is just text
purl(input = "02-cleaning-code-diet.Rmd",
     output = paste0(code_location, "02-cleaning-code-diet.R"),
     documentation = 2)

purl(input = "03-cleaning-code-health.Rmd",
     output = paste0(code_location, "03-cleaning-code-health.R"),
     documentation = 2)

purl(input = "04-cleaning-code-enviro.Rmd",
     output = paste0(code_location, "04-cleaning-code-enviro.R"),
     documentation = 2)

purl(input = "05-cleaning-code-cost.Rmd",
     output = paste0(code_location, "05-cleaning-code-cost.R"),
     documentation = 2)

purl(input = "05-cleaning-code-cost.Rmd",
     output = paste0(code_location, "05-cleaning-code-cost.R"),
     documentation = 2)

purl(input = "06-calculate-impact-factors.Rmd",
     output = paste0(code_location, "06-calculate-impact-factors.R"),
     documentation = 2)

purl(input = "07-finalize-inputs.Rmd",
     output = paste0(code_location, "07-finalize-inputs.R"),
     documentation = 2)

purl(input = "08-run-models.Rmd",
     output = paste0(code_location, "run-models.R"),
     documentation = 2)

```
